info.title: MBTA V3 API
info.description: Massachusetts Bay Transportation Authority (MBTA) API providing real-time and scheduled transit data for the Boston area. Includes stations, routes, predictions, vehicles, alerts, and more. Follows the JSON:API specification.

tags.name: Facility
tags.description: Stop amenities (elevators, escalators, parking, bike racks)

get.description: List all alert resources. Supports filtering, sorting, pagination, and field selection per JSON:API specification.

parameters.name: filter[activity]
parameters.description: Filter by activity type (e.g. BOARD, EXIT, RIDE)

parameters.name: filter[route_type]
parameters.description: Filter by route type (0=Light Rail, 1=Heavy Rail, 2=Commuter Rail, 3=Bus, 4=Ferry)

parameters.name: filter[lifecycle]
parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle (NEW, ONGOING, ONGOING_UPCOMING, UPCOMING)

get.description: Get a single alert resource by ID.

parameters.name: filter[type]

apiKeyQuery.name: api_key
apiKeyQuery.description: API key passed as query parameter

apiKeyHeader.name: x-api-key
apiKeyHeader.description: API key passed in request header
